name: @sextant/conv-goals
description: The goals convention in TypeScript — a co-equal peer to clients/go/conventions/goals (ADR-0041, TASK-175). Hand-written verb logic over @sextant/sdk; record types generated from protocol/lexicons/goal.json. Passes the SAME conformance vectors the Go suite passes.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/goals.test.js dist/test/project.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js dist/test/lexgen.test.js dist/test/coequality.test.js
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && node --test dist/test/goals.test.js dist/test/project.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js dist/test/lexgen.test.js
